items.titolo: Steam Machine appears in Vulkan’s conformant product database — upcoming Valve console is certified compliant with the graphics API
items.descrizione: The Khronos Group, which created the Vulkan API standard and continues to develop and maintain it, added the Steam Machine to its list of conformant products. This does not indicate how far or soon a product will come to

items.titolo: CapCut approda su Gemini: editing più veloce grazie all’AI di Google
items.descrizione: Sarà possibile modificare foto e video tramite l’app di Gemini.
